title: rosa sepium subsp. micrantha
intro: Rosa sepium subsp. micrantha, also known as the small-flowered dog rose or dwarf dog rose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa sepium subsp. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
